description: Leiden (or louvain) clustering at one or more resolutions on a precomputed neighborhood graph, with a UMAP colored by each clustering.
rules: requires that sc.pp.neighbors has already been run (use reduce_dimensions first)
read-only input — writes a new clustered.h5ad + cluster UMAP under record_store
RESOLUTION is a space-separated list; higher = more clusters
leiden uses the scanpy 1.12 igraph backend; louvain is deprecated
usage: Set INPUT. Optional: RESOLUTION (e.g. '0.3 0.5 0.8'), ALGORITHM (leiden|louvain), KEY, NO_PLOTS=1. Output: clustered.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed (plus leidenalg/python-igraph for leiden); without it the porter writes a {} placeholder clustered.h5ad and still passes.
